isolation.concurrency: serial only; max concurrent validators for this surface is 1

assertions.title: Default trait methods can call sibling trait methods through Self

steps.action: Run `nix develop -c dune runtest` from the repo root
steps.expected: The current test suite remains green for trait/default-method behavior, including the regression coverage for sibling `self.summary()` calls.
steps.observed: Command exited 0. The suite completed successfully; repository test sources include explicit coverage for this behavior in `test/test_typecheck.ml` and `test/test_codegen.ml`.

steps.action: Compile `examples/traits.rg` with `rgoc` to a temporary Go file in the evidence directory
steps.expected: The example compiles successfully and the generated Go preserves the default method calling the sibling trait method on `self`.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and wrote `traits.go`. Generated method body is `func (self Article) Short() string { return self.Summary() }`.

steps.action: Validate the generated Go with `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go run`, and `go vet`
steps.expected: No formatter diff, successful build, successful execution, and clean vet output.
steps.observed: All commands exited 0. `gofmt -d` produced no diff, `go build` produced `traits.bin`, `go run` printed `Hello: World` then `Hello`, and `go vet` emitted no diagnostics.

commands.observation: Full suite passed; success output is quiet aside from the Nix shell banner.
Compilation succeeded and emitted Go implementing `Short()` via `self.Summary()`.
No diff output; generated Go is formatter-stable.
Build succeeded and produced a runnable binary.
Program output matched the checked example behavior: `Hello: World` and `Hello`.
Vet completed cleanly with no diagnostics.

evidence.generatedGoSnippet: func (self Article) Short() string { return self.Summary() }

frictions.description: `dune runtest` is silent on success for this repo, so the relevant assertion-specific evidence comes primarily from the direct `examples/traits.rg` CLI flow and generated Go inspection.
frictions.resolution: Supplemented the suite run with direct `rgoc` compilation plus downstream Go validation and captured the generated `Short()` implementation.

summary: VAL-TRAIT-014 passed: the suite stayed green, `examples/traits.rg` compiled through `rgoc`, generated Go implemented `Short()` via `self.Summary()`, and downstream `gofmt`, `go build`, `go run`, and `go vet` all succeeded.
